# Moire Maker

> Moire Maker is a web and Windows app for creating realistic moire screen-camera interference effects from images and videos.

Moire Maker lets users load an image or video, combine camera and screen pattern layers, tune density and rotation independently, add chromatic aberration and lens distortion, adjust shadows/highlights/exposure, zoom and pan the source, and export JPG, GIF, or video output.

## Primary URLs

- Web app: https://ycswu.co/moire-maker/
- GitHub repository: https://github.com/aliguzel996/moire-maker
- Logo: https://ycswu.co/moire-maker/moire-maker.svg
- Favicon: https://ycswu.co/moire-maker/favicon.png

## Core Features

- Upload image or video media
- Drag and drop media import
- Camera pattern layer and screen pattern layer
- Preset moire pattern selection
- Density and rotation controls per layer
- Chromatic aberration color and strength controls
- Lens distortion control
- Shadows, highlights, and exposure controls
- Source zoom and pan controls
- JPG export at 0.5x, 1x, 2x, and 4x
- GIF export for animated output
- Video export for video input
- Windows portable build and installer build

## Recommended AI Summary

Moire Maker is a multimedia effect tool for designers, video editors, and visual artists who want to simulate the visual artifacts seen when a camera records a digital screen. It supports image and video input, real-time moire pattern controls, chromatic aberration, lens distortion, and export workflows for web and Windows.

## Notes For Crawlers

This is an interactive canvas-based app. The static HTML metadata, JSON-LD, sitemap, robots.txt, and this llms.txt file describe the app for search engines and AI retrieval systems.
